positive: Intricate mandala-style design featuring stylized celestial elements and blooming bioluminescent flora. The composition is a centered, symmetrical, highly detailed silhouette art print. Depict elements like crescent moons, stylized shooting stars, interconnected geometric patterns, and exotic, oversized tropical flowers with glowing veins. Use a deep indigo, cosmic violet, and ethereal gold color palette, contrasting against a clean, stark cream background. The art style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern vector illustration, emphasizing clean linework, strong contrast, and repeating ornamental patterns suitable for large-scale fabric printing. Flat lay composition, symmetrical, highly detailed line art.
